allow: PowerShell($f = 'index.html'; $c = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $f; Write-Output \('Length: ' + $c.Length\); Write-Output \('Contains exact: ' + $c.Contains\('Assess Build vs Buy ROI with matured TCO matrix'\)\); $idx = $c.IndexOf\('Assess Build'\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Output \('Found at: ' + $idx\); Write-Output \('Snippet: [' + $c.Substring\($idx, 60\) + ']'\) })

PowerShell($blocking = @\(\); Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'node|chrome|brave|firefox|msedge|code|cursor' } | ForEach-Object { try { $files = Get-Process -Id $_.Id -Module -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FileName -match 'assets' }; if \($files\) { $blocking += [PSCustomObject]@{ Pid = $_.Id; Name = $_.ProcessName; Path = $files.FileName -join ', ' } } } catch {} }; if \($blocking.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Output 'No process modules under assets/ found via Get-Process -Module — likely a directory handle from cmd, explorer, or background watcher' } else { $blocking | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String })
Bash(perl -i -pe 's|\(<meta charset="UTF-8" />\)|$1\\n  <link rel="icon" href="assets/images/favicon.png" type="image/png">|' index.html)
Bash(perl -i -pe 's/with 80\\+ certified resources/with 300+ certified resources/g' partnerships/conga.html)

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120 Safari/537.36" "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap")
